hibernate-mapping.sql-query:
SELECT co.company, c.descr company_name, co.t2_comp_term_dt term_dt, co.t2_oe_quarter oe_quarter, hq.realm_year_id, rpy.plan_year_start, rpy.plan_year_end, c.state, c.postal zip, hq.state override_hq_state, hq.postal_code override_hq_zip, case when rpy.plan_year_end > sysdate - 30 then 1 else 0 end can_edit, case when rpy.plan_year_end > sysdate - 30 then 1 else 0 end can_delete, case when rpy.plan_year_end > sysdate - 30 then case when 0 = (select count(*) from xbss_hq_exception where company = co.company and realm_year_id > hq.realm_year_id) then case when 0 < (select count(*) from xbss_realm_plan_year rpy2 where rpy2.oe_quarter = rpy.oe_quarter and rpy2.plan_year_start > rpy.plan_year_start) then 1 else 0 end else 0 end else 0 end can_clone, case when 0 < (select count(*) from xbss_company c, xbss_strategy s where c.code = hq.company and c.realm_year_id = hq.realm_year_id and c.id = s.company_id) then 1 else 0 end has_strategies, (select min(rpy2.id) from xbss_realm_plan_year rpy2 where rpy2.oe_quarter = rpy.oe_quarter and rpy2.plan_year_start > rpy.plan_year_start) next_realm_year_id from xbss_hq_exception hq, xbss_realm_plan_year rpy, ps_t2_clientoption@hrdb_seeker co, ps_company_tbl@hrdb_seeker c where hq.company = co.company and rpy.id = hq.realm_year_id and c.company = co.company and c.effdt = ( case when 0 < (select count(*) from ps_company_tbl@hrdb_seeker c3 where c.company = c3.company and c3.effdt <= rpy.hq_lookup_date) then (select max(effdt) from ps_company_tbl@hrdb_seeker c2 where c.company = c2.company and c2.effdt <= rpy.hq_lookup_date) else (select min(effdt) from ps_company_tbl@hrdb_seeker c4 where c.company = c4.company) end)
and (:filter_quarter is null or :filter_quarter = co.t2_oe_quarter) and (:company is null or :company = co.company) order by rpy.plan_year_start desc, co.t2_oe_quarter, co.company

SELECT ORGID, COUNT(DISTINCT EMPLID) FROM ( WITH SELECTED_EMPLOYEES AS (SELECT R.ORGID, KY.PERS_KEY EMPLID, KY.PERSONID FROM PERSON_KEYS KY, ALLROLES_VW R WHERE KY.PERSONID = R.PERSONID AND KY.PERS_KEY_TYPE = 2 AND R.ORGID IN (:companies) AND S_ROLE = :role ) SELECT SE.ORGID, EM.EMAIL_ADDR, SE.EMPLID FROM PS_EMAIL_ADDRESSES@HRDB_SEEKER EM, SELECTED_EMPLOYEES SE WHERE EM.E_ADDR_TYPE IN ('BUSN', 'HOME', 'OTHR') AND EM.EMPLID = SE.EMPLID AND TRIM(EM.EMAIL_ADDR) IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT SE.ORGID, ACC.URL, SE.EMPLID FROM PERSON_ACCESSES ACC , SELECTED_EMPLOYEES SE WHERE ACC.PERSONID = SE.PERSONID AND ACC.MEDIA = 'Email' AND TRIM(ACC.URL) IS NOT NULL AND ACC.ACCESS_TYPE IN ('Work', 'Home', 'Other') AND SYSDATE BETWEEN ACC.EFFDT AND ACC.ENDDT ) GROUP BY ORGID

SELECT EMPLID, EMAIL_ADDR FROM (SELECT EMAIL_ADDR, EMPLID, SORT_ORDER, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EMPLID ORDER BY SORT_ORDER) RN FROM ( WITH SELECTED_EMPLOYEES AS (SELECT KY.PERS_KEY EMPLID, KY.PERSONID FROM PERSON_KEYS KY, ALLROLES_VW R WHERE KY.PERSONID = R.PERSONID AND KY.PERS_KEY_TYPE = 2 AND R.ORGID = :companyCode AND S_ROLE = :role UNION SELECT :emplId, NULL FROM DUAL WHERE 'EE' = :role ) SELECT EM.EMAIL_ADDR, SE.EMPLID, DECODE(EM.PREF_EMAIL_FLAG, 'Y', 1, DECODE(EM.E_ADDR_TYPE, 'BUSN', 2, 'HOME', 3, 'OTHR', 4)) SORT_ORDER FROM PS_EMAIL_ADDRESSES@HRDB_SEEKER EM, SELECTED_EMPLOYEES SE WHERE EM.E_ADDR_TYPE IN ('BUSN', 'HOME', 'OTHR') AND EM.EMPLID = SE.EMPLID AND TRIM(EM.EMAIL_ADDR) IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT ACC.URL, SE.EMPLID, DECODE(ACC.ACCESS_TYPE, 'Work', 11, 'Home', 12, 'Other', 13) SORT_ORDER FROM PERSON_ACCESSES ACC , SELECTED_EMPLOYEES SE WHERE ACC.PERSONID = SE.PERSONID AND ACC.MEDIA = 'Email' AND TRIM(ACC.URL) IS NOT NULL AND ACC.ACCESS_TYPE IN ('Work', 'Home', 'Other') AND SYSDATE BETWEEN ACC.EFFDT AND ACC.ENDDT ) ) WHERE RN = 1 ORDER BY EMPLID

WITH BUNDLE_MEDICAL_PLANS AS ( SELECT XRBPM.REGIONAL_PLAN_ID AS BUNDLE_PLAN_ID, XB.ID AS BUNDLE_ID FROM XBSS_BUNDLE_PLANS XBP, XBSS_BUNDLE XB, XBSS_REGIONAL_BASE_PLAN_MAPPING XRBPM WHERE XRBPM.BASE_PLAN_ID = XBP.BASE_BENEFIT_PLAN AND TO_DATE( :effDt ) BETWEEN XB.EFFDT AND XB.ENDDT AND TO_DATE( :effDt ) BETWEEN XBP.EFFDT AND XBP.ENDDT AND XBP.PORTFOLIO_ID IN ( :portfolios ) AND XB.ID = XBP.BUNDLE_ID AND XBP.OE_QUARTER = :oeQuarter AND XRBPM.OE_QUARTER = :oeQuarter AND TO_DATE( :effDt ) BETWEEN XRBPM.EFFDT AND XRBPM.ENDDT AND ( -- When bundleIds is NULL → only STATIC bundles (:bundleIds IS NULL AND XB.TYPE = 'STATIC')
-- When bundleIds is provided → filter by those IDs OR (:bundleIds IS NOT NULL AND XB.ID IN (:bundleIds)) ) AND 1 = :returnOnlyBundlePlans ) SELECT DISTINCT PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN, PLAN_VW.DESCR, PLANS.PLAN_TYPE, PLAN_VW.VENDOR_ID, NULL AS CROSS_REF_PLAN_ID, PLANS.PORTFOLIO_ID, PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID, REGIONS.MANDATORY_FLAG, PLANS.SITUS, PLANS.PLAN_CATEGORY, BMP.BUNDLE_ID FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN PLANS LEFT JOIN XBSS_RL_REGION_PLANS REGIONS ON REGIONS.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID = PLANS.ID LEFT JOIN BUNDLE_MEDICAL_PLANS BMP ON BMP.BUNDLE_PLAN_ID = PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN JOIN XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV PLAN_VW ON PLAN_VW.PLAN_TYPE = PLANS.PLAN_TYPE AND PLAN_VW.BENEFIT_PLAN = PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN WHERE PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID = :planYearId AND PLANS.PORTFOLIO_ID IN ( :portfolios ) AND PLANS.PLAN_TYPE IN ( '10', '11', '14', '1D', '1V' ) AND PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN ( :outOfRegionPlans ) AND ( NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM BUNDLE_MEDICAL_PLANS) OR PLANS.PLAN_TYPE IN ( '11', '14', '1D', '1V' ) OR PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN IN (SELECT BUNDLE_PLAN_ID FROM BUNDLE_MEDICAL_PLANS) ) AND (PLANS.IS_BUNDLE_EXCLUSIVE = 0 OR :returnOnlyBundlePlans = 1) AND ( PLANS.SITUS = :situs OR PLANS.SITUS IS NULL ) AND PLAN_VW.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV PV1 WHERE PV1.PLAN_TYPE = PLAN_VW.PLAN_TYPE AND PV1.BENEFIT_PLAN = PLAN_VW.BENEFIT_PLAN AND PV1.EFFDT <= ( SELECT LEAST(GREATEST(RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START, TRUNC( SYSDATE )), RPY.PLAN_YEAR_END) AS EFFDT FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY WHERE RPY.ID = PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID ) )

WITH BUNDLE_MEDICAL_PLANS AS ( SELECT XRBPM.REGIONAL_PLAN_ID AS BUNDLE_PLAN_ID, XB.ID AS BUNDLE_ID FROM XBSS_BUNDLE_QUARTER_PLAN BQP, XBSS_BUNDLE_QUARTER BQ, XBSS_BUNDLE XB, XBSS_REGIONAL_BASE_PLAN_MAPPING XRBPM WHERE XRBPM.BASE_PLAN_ID = BQP.BASE_BENEFIT_PLAN AND BQP.BUNDLE_QUARTER_ID = BQ.ID AND BQ.BUNDLE_ID = XB.ID AND TO_DATE( :effDt ) BETWEEN XB.EFFDT AND XB.ENDDT AND TO_DATE( :effDt ) BETWEEN BQP.EFFDT AND BQP.ENDDT AND BQP.PORTFOLIO_ID IN ( :portfolios ) AND BQ.OE_QUARTER = :oeQuarter AND XRBPM.OE_QUARTER = :oeQuarter AND TO_DATE( :effDt ) BETWEEN XRBPM.EFFDT AND XRBPM.ENDDT AND ( -- When bundleIds is NULL → only STATIC bundles (:bundleIds IS NULL AND XB.TYPE = 'STATIC')
-- When bundleIds is provided → filter by those IDs OR (:bundleIds IS NOT NULL AND XB.ID IN (:bundleIds)) ) AND 1 = :returnOnlyBundlePlans ) SELECT DISTINCT PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN, PLAN_VW.DESCR, PLANS.PLAN_TYPE, PLAN_VW.VENDOR_ID, NULL AS CROSS_REF_PLAN_ID, PLANS.PORTFOLIO_ID, PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID, REGIONS.MANDATORY_FLAG, PLANS.SITUS, PLANS.PLAN_CATEGORY, BMP.BUNDLE_ID FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN PLANS LEFT JOIN XBSS_RL_REGION_PLANS REGIONS ON REGIONS.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID = PLANS.ID LEFT JOIN BUNDLE_MEDICAL_PLANS BMP ON BMP.BUNDLE_PLAN_ID = PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN JOIN XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV PLAN_VW ON PLAN_VW.PLAN_TYPE = PLANS.PLAN_TYPE AND PLAN_VW.BENEFIT_PLAN = PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN WHERE PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID = :planYearId AND PLANS.PORTFOLIO_ID IN ( :portfolios ) AND PLANS.PLAN_TYPE IN ( '10', '11', '14', '1D', '1V' ) AND PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN ( :outOfRegionPlans ) AND ( NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM BUNDLE_MEDICAL_PLANS) OR PLANS.PLAN_TYPE IN ( '11', '14', '1D', '1V' ) OR PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN IN (SELECT BUNDLE_PLAN_ID FROM BUNDLE_MEDICAL_PLANS) ) AND (PLANS.IS_BUNDLE_EXCLUSIVE = 0 OR :returnOnlyBundlePlans = 1) AND ( PLANS.SITUS = :situs OR PLANS.SITUS IS NULL ) AND PLAN_VW.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV PV1 WHERE PV1.PLAN_TYPE = PLAN_VW.PLAN_TYPE AND PV1.BENEFIT_PLAN = PLAN_VW.BENEFIT_PLAN AND PV1.EFFDT <= ( SELECT LEAST(GREATEST(RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START, TRUNC( SYSDATE )), RPY.PLAN_YEAR_END) AS EFFDT FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY WHERE RPY.ID = PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID ) )

SELECT PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN , PLAN_VW.DESCR , PLANS.PLAN_TYPE , PLAN_VW.VENDOR_ID , NULL AS CROSS_REF_PLAN_ID , PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID , REGIONS.MANDATORY_FLAG , DSP.DISPLAY_SEQ FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN PLANS LEFT OUTER JOIN XBSS_PLAN_DISP_SEQ DSP ON DSP.REALM_YEAR_ID = PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID AND DSP.PLAN_TYPE = PLANS.PLAN_TYPE AND DSP.BENEFIT_PLAN = PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN JOIN XBSS_RL_REGION_PLANS REGIONS ON REGIONS.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID = PLANS.ID JOIN XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV PLAN_VW ON PLAN_VW.PLAN_TYPE = PLANS.PLAN_TYPE AND PLAN_VW.BENEFIT_PLAN = PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN WHERE PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID = :planYearId AND PLANS.PLAN_TYPE IN ( :planTypes ) AND REGIONS.MANDATORY_FLAG = 1 AND PLAN_VW.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV PV1 WHERE PV1.PLAN_TYPE = PLAN_VW.PLAN_TYPE AND PV1.BENEFIT_PLAN = PLAN_VW.BENEFIT_PLAN AND PV1.EFFDT <= ( SELECT LEAST( GREATEST( RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START, TRUNC( sysdate ) ), RPY.PLAN_YEAR_END ) AS EFFDT FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY WHERE RPY.ID = PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID ) ) UNION SELECT PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN , PLAN_VW.DESCR , PLANS.PLAN_TYPE , PLAN_VW.VENDOR_ID , NULL AS CROSS_REF_PLAN_ID , PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID , REGIONS.MANDATORY_FLAG , DSP.DISPLAY_SEQ FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN PLANS LEFT OUTER JOIN XBSS_PLAN_DISP_SEQ DSP ON DSP.REALM_YEAR_ID = PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID AND DSP.PLAN_TYPE = PLANS.PLAN_TYPE AND DSP.BENEFIT_PLAN = PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN LEFT JOIN XBSS_RL_REGION_PLANS REGIONS ON REGIONS.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID = PLANS.ID JOIN XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV PLAN_VW ON PLAN_VW.PLAN_TYPE = PLANS.PLAN_TYPE AND PLAN_VW.BENEFIT_PLAN = PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN WHERE PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID = :planYearId AND PLANS.PLAN_TYPE IN ( :planTypes ) AND PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN ( SELECT PLANS_3.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN PLANS_3 LEFT JOIN XBSS_RL_REGION_PLANS REGIONS_3 ON REGIONS_3.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID = PLANS_3.ID WHERE PLANS_3.REALM_YEAR_ID = :planYearId AND REGIONS_3.MANDATORY_FLAG = 1 ) AND PLAN_VW.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV PV1 WHERE PV1.PLAN_TYPE = PLAN_VW.PLAN_TYPE AND PV1.BENEFIT_PLAN = PLAN_VW.BENEFIT_PLAN AND PV1.EFFDT <= ( SELECT LEAST( GREATEST( RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START, TRUNC( sysdate ) ), RPY.PLAN_YEAR_END ) AS EFFDT FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY WHERE RPY.ID = PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID ) )

SELECT ASP.BENEFIT_PLAN, ( SELECT AU.DESCR FROM XBSS_AUTOSELECT AU WHERE AU.ID = ASP.AUTOSELECT_ID ) AS GROUP_NAME FROM XBSS_AUTOSELECT_PLAN ASP WHERE ( ASP.REALM_YEAR_ID, ASP.AUTOSELECT_ID ) IN (SELECT gp.realm_year_id, gp.autoselect_id FROM xbss_autoselect_plan gp WHERE GP.BENEFIT_PLAN IN (SELECT plan.benefit_plan FROM xbss_realm_plyr_plan plan WHERE plan.realm_year_id = :planYearId ) )

update xbss_employee set UPDATED_BENEFIT_PROGRAM = (select distinct benefit_program from xbss_group where id =:groupId), BENEFIT_GROUP_NAME = (select distinct descr from xbss_group where id =:groupId), ELIG_CONFIG1 = ( select distinct ELIG_CONFIG1 from xbss_group where id =:groupId),BENEFIT_GROUP_ID =:groupId where EMPLID in (:listOfEmployeeIds)
update xbss_group set headCount=:headCount where company_id=:company and benefit_program =:benefitProgram
update xbss_company set head_Count=:headCount where id =:company
select distinct EMPLID, BENEFIT_PROGRAM, UPDATED_BENEFIT_PROGRAM, BENEFIT_GROUP_ID, BENEFIT_GROUP_NAME, ELIG_CONFIG1 from xbss_employee where COMPANY =:companyCode and realm_year_id =:realmYearId
select g.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, g.ID, g.DESCR, g.ELIG_CONFIG1 from xbss_group g, xbss_company c where c.id = g.company_id and c.code =:companyCode and c.realm_year_id =:realmYearId

SELECT EMPLID, EMPL_RCD, STRATEGY_GROUP_ID, CURRENT_BENEFIT_PROGRAM, FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM, FUTURE_GROUP_DESCR, FUTURE_GROUP_ID, CASE WHEN FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM = CURRENT_BENEFIT_PROGRAM THEN 'false' ELSE 'true' END AS BENEFIT_PROGRAM_CHANGED FROM XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW WHERE STRATEGY_ID = :STRATEGY_ID

SELECT XESGV.EMPLID, XESGV.EMPL_RCD, XESGV.STRATEGY_GROUP_ID, XESGV.STRATEGY_ID, XESGV.CURRENT_BENEFIT_PROGRAM, XESGV.CURRENT_ELIG_CONFIG1, XESGV.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM, XESGV.FUTURE_GROUP_DESCR, XESGV.FUTURE_GROUP_ID, XESGV.FUTURE_ELIG_CONFIG1 FROM XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW XESGV WHERE XESGV.STRATEGY_ID = :STRATEGY_ID
SELECT XESGV.EMPLID FROM XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW XESGV WHERE XESGV.STRATEGY_ID = :STRATEGY_ID AND XESGV.FUTURE_GROUP_ID=:GROUP_ID
DELETE FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE WHERE EMPLID IN (:LISTOFEMPLIDS)
DELETE FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_STRATEGY_GROUP WHERE EMPLID IN (:LISTOFEMPLIDS)

WITH EMPLOYEE_PLAN_MAPPING AS (SELECT EC.EMPLID, PD.PLAN_TYPE, PD.BENEFIT_PLAN cur_benefit_plan, PMC.BENEFIT_PLAN next_ben_plan, PMA.BENEFIT_PLAN next_alt_ben_plan, EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM cur_ben_program FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS EC, XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_DATA PD LEFT OUTER JOIN XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_MAPPING PMC ON PMC.EMP_PLAN_DATA_ID = PD.ID AND PD.PRIMARY_VENDOR = PMC.PRIMARY_VENDOR AND PD.PLAN_TYPE = PMC.PLAN_TYPE LEFT OUTER JOIN XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_MAPPING PMA ON PMA.EMP_PLAN_DATA_ID = PD.ID AND PD.PRIMARY_VENDOR <> PMA.PRIMARY_VENDOR AND PD.PLAN_TYPE = PMA.plan_type WHERE EC.ID = PD.EE_CEN_ID AND PD.PLAN_TYPE IN (:medicalPlanTypes) AND EC.COMPANY = :companyCode AND EC.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYearId UNION SELECT EC.EMPLID, PD.PLAN_TYPE, PD.BENEFIT_PLAN cur_benefit_plan, PMC.BENEFIT_PLAN next_ben_plan, PMA.BENEFIT_PLAN next_alt_ben_plan, EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM cur_ben_program FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS EC, XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_DATA PD LEFT OUTER JOIN XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_MAPPING PMC ON PMC.EMP_PLAN_DATA_ID = PD.ID AND PD.PRIMARY_VENDOR = PMC.PRIMARY_VENDOR AND PD.PLAN_TYPE = PMC.PLAN_TYPE LEFT OUTER JOIN XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_MAPPING PMA ON PMA.EMP_PLAN_DATA_ID = PD.ID AND PD.PLAN_TYPE <> PMA.PLAN_TYPE AND PD.PLAN_TYPE IN (:dentalPlanTypes) WHERE EC.ID = PD.EE_CEN_ID AND PD.PLAN_TYPE IN (:dentalPlanTypes) AND EC.COMPANY = :companyCode AND EC.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYearId UNION SELECT EC.EMPLID, PD.PLAN_TYPE, PD.BENEFIT_PLAN cur_benefit_plan, PMC.BENEFIT_PLAN next_ben_plan, PMA.BENEFIT_PLAN next_alt_ben_plan, EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM cur_ben_program FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS EC, XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_DATA PD LEFT OUTER JOIN XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_MAPPING PMC ON PMC.EMP_PLAN_DATA_ID = PD.ID AND PD.PRIMARY_VENDOR = PMC.PRIMARY_VENDOR AND PD.PLAN_TYPE = PMC.PLAN_TYPE LEFT OUTER JOIN XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_MAPPING PMA ON PMA.EMP_PLAN_DATA_ID = PD.ID AND PD.PLAN_TYPE <> PMA.PLAN_TYPE AND PD.PLAN_TYPE IN (:visionPlanTypes) WHERE EC.ID = PD.EE_CEN_ID AND PD.PLAN_TYPE IN (:visionPlanTypes) AND EC.COMPANY = :companyCode AND EC.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYearId ) SELECT epm.EMPLID, epm.PLAN_TYPE, epm.cur_benefit_plan, epm.next_ben_plan, epm.next_alt_ben_plan, epm.cur_ben_program FROM EMPLOYEE_PLAN_MAPPING epm, PS_NAMES@HRDB_SEEKER pn WHERE pn.EMPLID = epm.EMPLID AND pn.NAME_TYPE = 'PRI' AND pn.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( pn1.EFFDT ) FROM PS_NAMES@HRDB_SEEKER pn1 WHERE pn1.EMPLID = pn.EMPLID AND pn1.NAME_TYPE = pn.NAME_TYPE AND pn1.EFFDT < :effDate ) ORDER BY pn.LAST_NAME, pn.FIRST_NAME, pn.MIDDLE_NAME

SELECT xea.APPROVER, TRIM(TRIM(psn.FIRST_NAME || ' ' || psn.MIDDLE_NAME) || ' ' || psn.LAST_NAME) AS FULL_NAME, xea.EXCEPTION_TYPE FROM XBSS_EXCEPTION_APPROVERS xea JOIN PS_NAMES@HRDB_SEEKER psn ON xea.APPROVER = psn.EMPLID
SELECT APPS_ID, S_ROLE FROM BENEFITS_COMMON.ADMIN_APPS_ROLES ar JOIN BENEFITS_COMMON.ADMIN_APPS aa ON ar.APPS_ID = aa.ID AND aa.APP_KEY = :appKey

SELECT RL.KEY, RL.VALUE , CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 'X' FROM XBSS_PLAN_DESELECTION_EXCEPTION WHERE COMPANY = :companyCode AND ACTIVE = '1' AND TO_DATE( :effDt ) BETWEEN START_DATE AND END_DATE ) THEN '1' ELSE '0' END EXCEPTION FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_RULES RL , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY WHERE RPY.ID = :realmYearId AND RL.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN RL.EFFDT AND RL.ENDDT AND RL.KEY = 'PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG'

WITH SUBMISSIONS AS (SELECT tmpRes.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY realm_id, effective_date ORDER BY submmitted_dt DESC, ss_id desc ) AS rownumber FROM ( SELECT * FROM( SELECT s.id strategy_id, py.id as Realm_ID, py.plan_year_start, py.plan_year_end, CASE WHEN ss.service_order IS NULL THEN py.plan_year_start ELSE ( SELECT MAX(mid_year_effdt) FROM xbss_sched_mid_year_funding smf, xbss_company c WHERE smf.service_order_num = ss.service_order AND smf.company_id = c.id AND c.realm_year_id = ss.realm_year_id AND c.code = :company ) END effective_date, CASE WHEN ss.service_order IS NOT NULL THEN 'Mid-Year Submit' ELSE CASE WHEN s.default_submit = 1 THEN 'Default Submit' ELSE CASE WHEN ss.user_id = 'BANDCHANGE' THEN 'TriNet' ELSE nvl(( SELECT NM.NAME_DISPLAY FROM PS_NAMES@hrdb_seeker NM WHERE NM.EMPLID = ss.user_id AND NM.NAME_TYPE = 'PRI' AND NM.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_NAMES@hrdb_seeker N1 WHERE N1.EMPLID = NM.EMPLID AND N1.NAME_TYPE = NM.NAME_TYPE AND N1.EFFDT < sysdate ) ), 'Unknown') END END END submit_user, ss.confirmation_number, ss.create_time submmitted_dt, ss.id ss_id FROM xbss_strategy s, xbss_company c, xbss_realm_plan_year py, xbss_submit_status ss WHERE company = :company AND ss.statement_upload_status = 'SUCCESS' AND s.id = ss.strategy_id AND s.company_id = c.id AND c.realm_year_id = py.id ) ) tmpRes ) SELECT * FROM SUBMISSIONS WHERE rownumber = 1 ORDER BY effective_date DESC

with app_feature_flags as ( select key, flag_level, flag_level_value, value, create_time, 3 priority from xbss_feature_flag where flag_level = 'Global' and trunc(sysdate) between trunc(effdt) and trunc(enddt) union select key, flag_level, flag_level_value, value, create_time, 2 priority from xbss_feature_flag where flag_level = 'Quarter' and FLAG_LEVEL_VALUE = ( select oe_quarter from xbss_realm_plan_year rpy where rpy.id = :planYearId) and trunc(sysdate) between trunc(effdt) and trunc(enddt) union select key, flag_level, flag_level_value, value, create_time, 1 priority from xbss_feature_flag where flag_level = 'Company' and FLAG_LEVEL_VALUE = :companyCode and trunc(sysdate) between trunc(effdt) and trunc(enddt) order by key) select key, value from app_feature_flags ff where ff.priority = (select min(priority) from app_feature_flags ff2 where ff2.key = ff.key) order by create_time desc

SELECT rpy.id realm_year_id, rpy.plan_year_start, rpy.plan_year_end, case when 0 < ( select count(*) from xbss_company c, xbss_strategy s where c.code =:company and c.realm_year_id NOT IN ( SELECT realm_year_id FROM xbss_hq_exception WHERE company = :company ) and c.id = s.company_id ) then 1 else 0 end has_strategies FROM xbss_realm_plan_year rpy, ps_t2_clientoption@hrdb_seeker co WHERE co.company = :company AND co.t2_oe_quarter = rpy.oe_quarter AND rpy.plan_year_end >= sysdate - 30 AND rpy.id NOT IN ( SELECT realm_year_id FROM xbss_hq_exception WHERE company = :company ) ORDER BY rpy.plan_year_start DESC;

Select c.descr company_name, rpy.id realm_year_id, rpy.oe_quarter, rpy.plan_year_start, rpy.plan_year_end, c.state, c.postal zip, case when 0 < (select count(*) from xbss_company c1, xbss_strategy s where c1.code = c.company and c1.realm_year_id = rpy.id and c1.id = s.company_id) then 1 else 0 end has_strategies from xbss_realm_plan_year rpy, ps_t2_clientoption@hrdb_seeker co, ps_company_tbl@hrdb_seeker c where co.company = :company and co.company = c.company and c.effdt = case when 0 < (select count(*) from ps_company_tbl@hrdb_seeker c3 where c.company = c3.company and c3.effdt <= rpy.hq_lookup_date) then (select max(effdt) from ps_company_tbl@hrdb_seeker c2 where c.company = c2.company and c2.effdt <= rpy.hq_lookup_date) else (select min(effdt) from ps_company_tbl@hrdb_seeker c4 where c.company = c4.company) end and co.t2_oe_quarter = rpy.oe_quarter and rpy.plan_year_end >= sysdate - 30 and rpy.id not in (select realm_year_id from xbss_hq_exception where company = :company) order by rpy.plan_year_start desc

SELECT rbpm.regional_plan_id, rbpm.base_plan_id, rbpm.base_plan_descr FROM xbss_regional_base_plan_mapping rbpm WHERE rbpm.oe_quarter = :oeQuarter AND rbpm.realm_id = :realmId AND :effDt BETWEEN rbpm.effdt AND rbpm.enddt

SELECT RBPM.REGIONAL_PLAN_ID FROM XBSS_REGIONAL_BASE_PLAN_MAPPING RBPM, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT SGP, XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY WHERE RBPM.REGIONAL_PLAN_ID = SGP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND RPY.OE_QUARTER = RBPM.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.REALM_ID = RBPM.REALM_ID AND RBPM.BASE_PLAN_ID = :basePlanId AND SGP.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND SGP.GROUP_ID = :groupId AND RPY.ID = :realmPlanYearId AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN RBPM.EFFDT AND RBPM.ENDDT

SELECT EG.emplid , EG.strategy_id , EG.strategy_group_id , G.group_type , G.DESCR , G.BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW EG , XBSS_GROUP G WHERE CODE = :companyCode AND EG.future_group_id = G.id

SELECT sg.id, sg.strategy_id,gp.group_type,gp.descr FROM xbss_company c, XBSS_STRATEGY s, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP sg,XBSS_GROUP gp WHERE c.id=s.company_id AND s.id=sg.strategy_id AND sg.group_id=gp.id AND s.status= 'A' AND sg.status='A' AND gp.status='A' AND (sg.default_group=1 OR gp.GROUP_TYPE='K1' or gp.descr='W2 MA') AND c.code=:companyCode
SELECT ZIPCODE, STATE FROM BENEFITS_COMMON.ZIPCODES z WHERE z.ZIPCODE IN (:zipcodes)

SELECT DISTINCT x1.benefit_plan old_benefit_plan, x2.benefit_plan new_benefit_plan FROM xbss_realm_plyr_plan x1, xbss_realm_plyr_plan x2, XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV M1, XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV M2 WHERE x1.benefit_plan = m1.benefit_plan AND x2.benefit_plan = m2.benefit_plan AND x1.realm_year_id = :oldPlanYear AND x2.realm_year_id = :newPlanYear AND ((:applySitus = 0 AND m2.descr = m1.descr ) OR (:applySitus != 0 AND UPPER(m2.descr) = UPPER(m1.descr))) AND (:applySitus = 0 OR (x1.situs != x2.situs OR x1.situs is NULL)) AND x2.plan_type = x1.plan_type AND m2.plan_type = m1.plan_type AND m1.effdt = ( SELECT MAX(effdt) FROM xbss_benef_plan_mv b1 WHERE b1.plan_type = m1.plan_type AND b1.benefit_plan = m1.benefit_plan AND b1.effdt <= :oldPlanYearEffDt ) AND m2.effdt = ( SELECT MAX(effdt) FROM xbss_benef_plan_mv b1 WHERE b1.plan_type = m2.plan_type AND b1.benefit_plan = m2.benefit_plan AND b1.effdt <= :newPlanYearEffDt ) AND m1.plan_type NOT IN ( '30', '31' ) AND x2.portfolio_id = x1.portfolio_id

SELECT DISTINCT XSGP.BENEFIT_PLAN benefit_plan, XPE.DESCR carrier, XC.BN_EMPLR_RATE emplrCost, XC.BN_EMPL_RATE empCost FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGP, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN XRPP, XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT XPE, XBSS_CONTRIBUTION XC WHERE XRPP.PORTFOLIO_ID = XPE.PORTFOLIO_ID AND XSGP.BENEFIT_PLAN = XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND XSGP.PLAN_TYPE = XRPP.PLAN_TYPE AND XC.PLAN_SELECTION_ID = XSGP.ID AND XSGP.PLAN_TYPE = :planType AND XSGP.STRATEGY_ID=:strategyId AND XSGP.GROUP_ID = :groupId AND XC.COVERAGE_LEVEL = :cvgTierCode AND XPE.EFFDT =( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT P1 WHERE P1.PORTFOLIO_ID = XRPP.PORTFOLIO_ID AND P1.EFFDT <= :effDate)
